title: Brian Richardson
text: Home * People * Brian Richardson Brian Richardson [1] Brian Richardson , a retired American IT professional [2] holding a B.Sc. Computer Science from Rutgers University in 1978. Doing computer chess since 1971, Brian Richardson is author of the private Chess Engine Communication Protocol compatible chess engine Tinker . More recently, inspired by the AlphaGo and AlphaZero publications along with the open source developments around Leela Chess Zero , Brian tinkers around with neural networks and Monte-Carlo tree search [3] .
